title: Vadodara Summer Has Arrived — 37°C Today, 40°C+ Coming!
body: Temperatures in Vadodara have already crossed 37°C today — and forecasts show April touching 42°C and May reaching 40°C+. Summer weddings, events and daily hydration needs are at their peak. Make sure your home, office and event venue has enough Anjani 200ml water stocked up. We deliver same-day across all Vadodara areas.

title: Delhi–Vadodara Expressway Ready by May — More Events, More Guests!
body: Union Minister Nitin Gadkari announced the Delhi–Vadodara Expressway section will be ready by May 2026. This means more visitors, more weddings, more corporate events and more party plots active in Vadodara this summer season. Anjani Water is ready to supply bulk packaged drinking water for every event that comes to our city.

title: Middle East Conflict Pushing Up Water Bottle Costs Across India
body: The ongoing US–Iran–Israel conflict is disrupting global oil supply routes. PET plastic — used in every water bottle — is an oil-based product, so rising crude prices are directly increasing bottling costs. National brands are already signalling price hikes. Anjani Water is absorbing these pressures to protect Vadodara customers for as long as possible. Lock in your bulk order now at current rates.

title: Summer Health Tip — Adults Need 3–4 Litres of Water Daily in This Heat
body: With Vadodara temperatures rising above 37°C, doctors recommend adults drink at least 3–4 litres of water every day to avoid dehydration and heat stroke. Keep sealed, BIS certified Anjani 200ml bottles at your home, office and event. Pure water, trusted quality — delivered across all Vadodara areas.
